subject: Your trial of Faculty of 1000 Biology is ending
body:
Dear Jeff Epstein

Your free trial to Faculty of 1000 Biology will end on 30 March 2008 (GMT). We hope you enjoyed your free access and found this a valuable service to highlight the most important papers published in your area of research. If you would like to continue to access this service, subscribe today. For just $125/£65/101 Euros, you can have complete online access for 12 months. Simply subscribe online using our secure server http://www.f1000biology.com/subscribe

As a subscriber, you would receive regular email alerts updating you with recent papers selected by the Faculty in your areas of interest. If you'd like to request that your library or institution subscribes to Faculty of 1000 Biology, use our online form to request that your librarian evaluates the service and registers for a 30-day institutional free trial http://www.f1000biology.com/about/institution/recommend

If you have any questions please contact us by email at info@f1000biology.com or by phone at +44 (0) 20 7631 9131.

We hope you'll chose to use Faculty of 1000 Biology to help you navigate the sea of literature!

Best wishes

The Customer Services Team
Faculty of 1000 Biology

http://www.f1000biology.com
